sentences.text: She continued, 'Listening to you makes me feel sleepy, just like being in church.'
The Miller replied, 'Many people can act well, but few can talk well, which is much harder and better.'
He looked seriously at his little son, who felt embarrassed, lowered his head, and cried into his tea.
The boy was very young, so you should forgive him for his mistake.
